entries.desc: Quick Chat - Ernest, Claudio, and Katy
CrowdStrike contract negotiation meeting with RPA team and vendor.

Kickoff meeting ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” introductions with VP Technology (Ernest Ostro) and Claudio. Environment overview, scope alignment, initial access coordination. Teams video.

Introductory call ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” Ernest Ostro, Claudio. Initial engagement kickoff, consultant alignment, project scope discussion. Teams video.
IT Project Daily Stand-Up ГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚ВѓГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВўГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВѓГ‚ВѓГѓВ‚Г‚В‚ГѓВѓГ‚В‚ГѓВ‚Г‚В” Ernest Ostro, Katy Thompson, Maruan Barakat. Teams video.

invoices.description:
20% upfront retainer per Consulting Agreement dated April 28, 2026.
Scope: M365 Administration (Exchange Online, Azure AD / Entra ID, Intune, SharePoint, Teams, Defender, PowerShell).
This retainer will be applied as a credit against subsequent monthly invoices.
invoices.notes: Payment via ACH. Please send remittance confirmation to maruan.barakat@gmail.com.
